stemHtml: A pilot has completed the ILS approach to RWY 22 followed by a circle to land for RWY 04. She/he is now on the base leg of RWY 04 and has lost visual reference. The correct missed approach procedure is to initiate a climbing turn toward the _____, return to circling altitude or _____, and immediately followed by interception and execution of the missed approach procedure specified on the _____.
